title: Skill Frontmatter
description: Validates the parsed YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md file (agentskills.io Agent Skills convention). The Markdown body of SKILL.md is the skill's instructions. FlowForge-specific fields live under 'metadata'.

name.description: Skill identifier: lowercase letters, digits and hyphens, matching the skill folder name. Agents reference skills by this name.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it.

allowed-tools.description: Tools the skill is allowed to use (Agent Skills spec field).

metadata.description: Open extension map. FlowForge-specific fields are defined here.

displayName.description: Human-friendly skill name for UI display.

prompts.description: Relative paths to prompt fragment files contributed by this skill.

tools.description: Relative path to a tools.json declaring tools this skill provides.

embeddings.description: Relative paths of documents to embed into the memory of agents equipped with this skill.

dependencies.description: Names of skills this skill depends on.

compatibleAgents.description: Agent ids or roles this skill is compatible with. Empty means any.
